title: Fix bug #6431, relink super functions to default instances of parametrized classes.

features.name: parametrized class with default type parameter
features.description: Code should include a class with a default type parameter using #(.type T = int) syntax

features.name: class extending parametrized class with super function call
features.description: Code should include a class that extends a parametrized class and calls a super class function using super keyword
